section.div:
Is AI making us all use the same tools, or is it empowering us to try new things? 🤔
The Head of GitHub Next, Idan Gazit, sees two trends colliding:
• Consolidation around popular frameworks where AI excels
• Lower barriers to programming languages you've never written
